steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We need to convert 51 meters to centimeters. The given conversion is 1 meter = 100 centimeters.

steps.title: Multiply by the conversion factor
steps.content: To convert 51 meters to centimeters, multiply:$$51 \text{ meters} \times 100 = 5,100 \text{ centimeters}$$That matches choice C — C is correct.
